description: Models video performance as a chain of behavioural gates.
Allocates creative effort between exploration and exploitation.
Prevents invalid conclusions from constant peeking.
Adds uncertainty intervals to AI predictions.
Estimates exposure needed for useful tests.
Clusters videos by mechanism and outcome.
Reviews hook, trust, cognition, CTA, and series fit.
Predicts likely CTV/APV/CPL ranges before posting.
Registers tests, variants, checkpoints, and decisions.
